description: Rebuild Woodchuck Hill 115kV yard with two 55 MVA transformers and eight distribution feeders.

project_name: Sandy Pond to Tewksbury Reliability Project
description: Refurbish 115kV K137E and L138E and 345kV 337 overhead transmission lines in existing ROW from Sandy Pond (Ayer) to Tewksbury Substation.
